lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕ ਓਟ ਕੀਜੈ ਜੀਉ ਦੀਜੈ ਆਸ ਇਕ ਧਰਣੀਧਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: eik ott keejai jeeo deejai aas ik dharaneedharai |
lines.english: Seek the Support of the One Lord, and surrender your soul to Him; place your hopes only in the Sustainer of the World.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਰੰਗੇ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਸਭੁ ਤਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasange har naam range sansaar saagar sabh tarai |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the Lord's Name, in the Saadh Sangat, cross over the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਿ ਜਾਇ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਪੁਰਖ ਪੂਰਨ ਥਿਰੁ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਸੋਹਾਗੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bal jaae naanak purakh pooran thir jaa kaa sohaag jeeo |3|
lines.english: Nanak is a sacrifice to the Perfect Primal Lord; His marriage is eternal. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਛੂਟੇ ਫਿਰਿ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਦਾਗੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran bikaar chhootte fir na laagai daag jeeo |
lines.english: The corrupting sins of birth and death are eradicated, and no stain ever sticks to them again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਮ ਅਰਥ ਅਰੁ ਕਾਮ ਮੋਖ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਨਾਥ ॥
lines.translit: dharam arath ar kaam mokh mukat padaarath naath |
lines.english: Righteous faith, wealth, fulfilment of desires and salvation; the Lord bestows these four blessings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਪੂਰਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਮਾਥ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sagal manorath pooriaa naanak likhiaa maath |1|
lines.english: One who has such pre-ordained destiny upon his forehead, O Nanak, has all his desires fulfilled. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਇਛ ਮੇਰੀ ਪੁੰਨੀਆ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਰਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: sagal ichh meree puneea miliaa niranjan raae jeeo |
lines.english: All my desires are fulfilled, meeting with my Immaculate, Sovereign Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: chhant |
lines.english: Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਲਾਲ ਆਏ ਪੁਰਬਿ ਕਮਾਏ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਉਪਮਾ ਕਿਆ ਗਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: grihi laal aae purab kamaae taa kee upamaa kiaa ganaa |
lines.english: My Beloved has come to my home, because of my past actions; how can I count His Glories?

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦੁ ਭਇਆ ਵਡਭਾਗੀਹੋ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਟੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਆਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: anad bheaa vaddabhaageeho grihi pragatte prabh aae jeeo |
lines.english: I am in ecstasy, O very fortunate ones; the Dear Lord has become manifest in my own home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਗਹਿ ਕੰਠਿ ਲਾਏ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨਾ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: aape milaae geh kantth laae tis binaa nahee jaae jeeo |
lines.english: He hugs me close in His embrace, and merges me into Himself; there is no place of rest other than Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਅੰਤ ਪੂਰਨ ਸੁਖ ਸਹਜ ਦਾਤਾ ਕਵਨ ਰਸਨਾ ਗੁਣ ਭਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: beant pooran sukh sehaj daataa kavan rasanaa gun bhanaa |
lines.english: The Lord, the Giver of peace and intuition, is infinite and perfect; with what tongue can I describe His Glorious Virtues?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਿ ਜਾਇ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਦਾ ਕਰਤੇ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: bal jaae naanak sadaa karate sabh meh rahiaa samaae jeeo |4|4|
lines.english: Nanak is forever a sacrifice to the Creator, who is contained in, and permeating all. ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਣ ਝੁੰਝਨੜਾ ਗਾਉ ਸਖੀ ਹਰਿ ਏਕੁ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: ran jhunjhanarraa gaau sakhee har ek dhiaavahu |
lines.english: Sing the melodious harmonies, O my companions, and meditate on the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: raag raamakalee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Raag Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਤੁਮ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਖੀ ਮਨਿ ਚਿੰਦਿਅੜਾ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur tum sev sakhee man chindiarraa fal paavahu |
lines.english: Serve your True Guru, O my companions, and you shall obtain the fruits of your mind's desires.

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਰੁਤੀ ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: raamakalee mahalaa 5 rutee salok |
lines.english: Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl, Ruti ~ The Seasons. Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਬੰਦਨ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਬਾਛਉ ਸਾਧਹ ਧੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: kar bandan prabh paarabraham baachhau saadhah dhoor |
lines.english: Bow to the Supreme Lord God, and seek the dust of the feet of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਨਿਵਾਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਭਜਉ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aap nivaar har har bhjau naanak prabh bharapoor |1|
lines.english: Cast out your self-conceit, and vibrate, meditate, on the Lord, Har, Har. O Nanak, God is all-pervading. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਕਾਟਣ ਭੈ ਹਰਣ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kilavikh kaattan bhai haran sukh saagar har raae |
lines.english: He is the Eradicator of sins, the Destroyer of fear, the Ocean of peace, the Sovereign Lord King.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨੋ ਨਾਨਕ ਨੀਤ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: deen deaal dukh bhanjano naanak neet dhiaae |2|
lines.english: Merciful to the meek, the Destroyer of pain: O Nanak, always meditate on Him. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: chhant |
lines.english: Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਸੁ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਵਡਭਾਗੀਹੋ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਭਗਵੰਤ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: jas gaavahu vaddabhaageeho kar kirapaa bhagavant jeeo |
lines.english: Sing His Praises, O very fortunate ones, and the Dear Lord God shall bless you with His Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੁਤੀ ਮਾਹ ਮੂਰਤ ਘੜੀ ਗੁਣ ਉਚਰਤ ਸੋਭਾਵੰਤ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: rutee maah moorat gharree gun ucharat sobhaavant jeeo |
lines.english: Blessed and auspicious is that season, that month, that moment, that hour, when you chant the Lord's Glorious Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲ ਜਨਮੁ ਭਇਆ ਤਿਨ ਕਾ ਜਿਨੀ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: safal janam bheaa tin kaa jinee so prabh paaeaa |
lines.english: Their lives become fruitful, and they find that Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਧੰਨਿ ਤੇ ਜਨ ਜਿਨੀ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gun rang raate dhan te jan jinee ik man dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: Blessed are those humble beings, who are imbued with love for His Praises, and who meditate single-mindedly on Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਜੀਵਾ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਰਹੰਤ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak simar jeevaa janam maran rahant jeeo |1|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, meditating in remembrance on Him, I live; birth and death are finished for me. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁੰਨ ਦਾਨ ਨ ਤੁਲਿ ਕਿਰਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਸਰਬ ਪਾਪਾ ਹੰਤ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: pun daan na tul kiriaa har sarab paapaa hant jeeo |
lines.english: Donations to charities and religious rituals are not equal to meditation on the Lord, who destroys all sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਦਮੁ ਅਗਮੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੋ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਨਮਸਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: audam agam agocharo charan kamal namasakaar |
lines.english: Strive for the inaccessible and unfathomable Lord, and bow in humility to His lotus feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਥਨੀ ਸਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵਸੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਅਧਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kathanee saa tudh bhaavasee naanak naam adhaar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, that sermon alone is pleasing to You, Lord, which inspires us to take the Support of the Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸਰਣਿ ਸਾਜਨ ਪਰਹੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਅਨੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: sant saran saajan parahu suaamee simar anant |
lines.english: Seek the Sanctuary of the Saints, O friends; meditate in remembrance on your infinite Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਕੇ ਤੇ ਹਰਿਆ ਥੀਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਪਿ ਭਗਵੰਤ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sooke te hariaa theea naanak jap bhagavant |2|
lines.english: The dried branch shall blossom forth in its greenery again, O Nanak, meditating on the Lord God. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੁਤਿ ਸਰਸ ਬਸੰਤ ਮਾਹ ਚੇਤੁ ਵੈਸਾਖ ਸੁਖ ਮਾਸੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: rut saras basant maah chet vaisaakh sukh maas jeeo |
lines.english: The season of spring is delightful; the months of Chayt and Baisaakhi are the most pleasant months.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: chhant |
lines.english: Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਨਾਹੁ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਅਨਦੁ ਸਖੀਏ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਪ੍ਰਫੁਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: ghar naahu nihachal anad sakhee charan kamal prafuliaa |
lines.english: The eternal, unchanging Lord has come into my home as my Husband, O my companions; dwelling upon His lotus feet, I blossom forth in bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਨਾਹੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਮਉਲਿਆ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸਾਸੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo naahu miliaa mauliaa man tan saas jeeo |
lines.english: I have obtained the Dear Lord as my Husband, and my mind, body and breath have blossomed forth.
